snippet.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:

and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

snippet.title: WHO | Official trailer. A Wil Aime Film
snippet.description:
Du réalisateur Wil Aime, découvrez la bande-annonce de WHO Après 6 ans d’absence, le réalisateur Wil Aime revient avec son tout premier film au cinéma. Thriller psychologique à haute tension qui s’inscrit dans un monde où chaque décision a un prix, et où le temps ne laisse aucune place à l’erreur.

« Dans un monde de monstre, qui est le monstre ? »

OUVERTURE DE LA BILLETTERIE  : 
Rendez-vous le lundi 4 mai à 18h sur www.chaquedetail.fr pour réserver vos places avant qu’il ne soit trop tard…

SORTIES SALLES :
France et DROM-COM, Belgique, Suisse : séances limitées les 28 et 29 mai 2026.
Canada : AVP 29 mai 2026. Puis dès le 5 juin 2026.
Afrique francophone : dès le 10 juin 2026.
Prochainement en Afrique anglophone, Amérique latine et reste de l’Europe.

___________________

snippet.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
snippet.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC.

숨 쉬지 않는 꽃들이
예쁘게 피었지만 향긴 나지 않는
너도 나와 같구나
 
유리 너머 보인
바단 어떤 곳일까
수천 번 헤엄쳐 봐도
닿질 않는 내 모습이

지나치게 또, 걱정과 두려움

새로운 먼 곳에
저 파도가 넘실대는 바다에
몸을 맡겨 흘러갈래
이 작은 공간에 한 발을 내디뎌
반짝이는 드넓은 저 바다로
 
아무도 찾지 않는 오래된
이끼만 가득 찬 이 흐린 유리를 넘어
작은 내 꿈들을 조금 떨어뜨려
이 바다에 스며들어 갈 거야
 
어항 속에서 쳐다본 별이
어느 날 내게 말을 걸어
아이야 넌 아직 어리고
저 바다는 여전히 흘러
 
너의 세상은 거기 있지 않아
네가 올려다본 둥근 하늘만 있는 게 아냐
그곳을 나와서 본 하늘은 또 다를걸
 
조금씩 금이 가 점점 물이 빠지고
그 사이를 힘껏 부딪쳐 깨질 듯한 벽
날카롭게 부서진 유리 조각이 조금 박혀도
괜찮아 이젠 곧이니까
 
새로운 먼 곳에
저 파도가 넘실대는 바다에
몸을 맡겨 흘러갈래
이 작은 공간에 한 발을 내디뎌
반짝이는 드넓은 저 바다로

아무도 찾지 않는 오래된
이끼만 가득 찬 이 흐린 유리를 넘어
작은 내 꿈들을 조금 떨어뜨려
이 바다에 스며들어 갈 거야

snippet.description:
Told entirely from the perspective of its avian protagonist, Hen follows a chicken who escapes an industrial farm only to find herself navigating the pecking order of a crumbling seaside restaurant in Greece. As she fights to protect her eggs, she becomes an unwitting witness to the complex human lives around her as the restaurant is caught up in greed, smuggling, and the migrant crisis.

snippet.title: Saifond Feat Rayvanny I Love You (clip Officiel By Mintigui Prod
snippet.description:
En prélude à la sortie très attendue de son album Holo Horema, prévue le 2 mai au stade Petit Sory de Nongo, Saifond frappe fort en dévoilant l’un des titres phares du projet, en featuring avec Rayvany. Portée par un subtil mélange de poular, de swahili et d’anglais, cette chanson envoûtante célèbre la beauté d’une dulcinée à travers des déclarations d’amour intenses et sincères. Entre romantisme, complicité et passion assumée, ce morceau s’impose comme une véritable hymne à l’amour, taillé pour marquer les esprits.

snippet.title: PAC-MAN: Snack Breaks | Official Teaser Trailer

PAC-MAN is heading to NEW PAC-CITY!
New animated series premieres May 22 on YouTube. Subscribe now.
 
What adventures are being cooked up? What a-MAZE-ing challenges will PAC-MAN chomp through? Find out in PAC-MAN: Snack Breaks, where snack-sized moments turn into feasts of fun and life is not just a 1-player game. Join PAC-MAN along with a colorful cast of characters, some of whom will help PAC-MAN conquer his day-to-day quests, while others will serve up chaos on a whole new level.

snippet.title: SPEECHLESS - Dunsin Oyekan ft @theophilussunday..  #dunsinoyekan #worshipmusic
snippet.description:
The sound of glory, no one encounters God and remains the same.
No one beholds glory and returns unchanged.

Glory to God for access to His throne.
Glory to God for access to glory.

Like Abraham, who “fell on his face” before God (Genesis 17:3),
and like John the Apostle, who “fell at His feet as though dead” (Revelation 1:17),
we collapse in humble adoration.

Words fail us.
We become instrument
and sounds like glory pour through us.

What a God.
What a King.

Track 5 on the New Wine Album (2026) https://found.ee/NewWine

snippet.title: I Gave 300 Minecraft Players One Plot Each to Build A Museum
snippet.description:
Welcome to the RT Museum. Every player gets a display to build whatever they like

Watch us build Rome in a day in Minecraft: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y-Hz3Nct-eo

- This video was recorded live on my Twitch Channel: http://www.twitch.tv/rtgame
- Subscribe if you'd like to see more! https://www.youtube.com/@RTGame?sub_confirmation=1
- Become a Youtube Member to support me: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRC6cNamj9tYAO6h_RXd5xA/join

- Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/rtgame.bsky.social
- Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rtgamecrowd
- Join the RTGame Discord Server: https://discord.gg/rtgame
- Watch my full streams on my Archive Channel: https://www.youtube.com/rtgamestreamarchive
- RTGame Clip Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RTGameClips

Everything in this video was recorded live on my Twitch Channel. My schedule is Tuesday & Thursday @ 7pm, Saturday & Sunday @ 3pm - all times based in Ireland. 

Edited by Ashtaric (Cloé), you can find her here: https://bsky.app/profile/ashtaric.bsky.social And here: https://www.twitch.tv/ashtaric

My Minecraft Server is available for Twitch Subscribers or Youtube Members. For the login information, head to my Twitch channel and type !server in my chat. You also need a Discord account to join. This is so we can moderate and manage the server due to demand. The server is open 24/7 and has a survival world, as well as a museum of every past build we've done on the channel.

Music is Super Mario Odyssey - Steam Gardens & Peach's Castle, Animal Crossing New Leaf - Tortimer Island (Day), Super Mario Bros Wonder - Beach Theme & Petal Isles, Mario Kart 8 - Water Park, Tomodachi Life Living the Dream - Title Screen & Mii Maker, Kirby Return to Dreamland - Summer Sands, Super Mario Galaxy 2 - Sunshine Beach, Animal Crossing New Horizons - 12pm, Go Vacation - Hello My Holiday.
